meta.title: RabbitMatch — Match & tournament platform for racket sports
meta.description: Organize matches and tournaments for padel, tennis, table tennis, badminton and squash. CRM for sports clubs.
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back
hero.title: Sports without the chaos
hero.subtitle: RabbitMatch is the unified platform for racket sports: tournament and match organization, an international-grade rating system, deep analytics, easy booking and a CRM for clubs.
solution.lead: Legacy CRMs are outdated. We're building an ecosystem for businesses and players.
solution.aiHighlight: AI that helps you earn money
solution.items.01body: iOS, Android, Web and Telegram Mini App. A live stream of players and bookings flows directly to your courts. Run tournaments and collect player analytics.
solution.items.02title: A single database of all players
solution.items.02body: Browsing history, preferences, contacts. Personalized offers for every client.
solution.items.03body: Use artificial intelligence to analyze financial KPIs and recommendations, monitor court utilization, revenue and player communication — all in one place.
solution.crm.title: RABBITMATCH
solution.crm.subtitle: CLUBS CRM
players.title: The players find you themselves
players.tournamentsBody: An interface for organizing and managing tournaments with 5+ formats and 20+ individual settings. A pro rating system that simplifies finding the right players for every game. A growing player base, ratings and profiles — your club inside a live venue.
players.tournamentsHighlight: On average +30% in customers for bookings
players.bookingBody: Pick the date, time and court in two clicks — no phone calls or messengers. Direct integration with the CRM for club owners.
players.controlBody: Manage prices, subscriptions, schedules, promotions and news for your customers — from one place.
players.controlHighlight: Your schedule is always at hand

launch.title: Launch in 3 steps
launch.intro1Body: English and Russian. The interface, notifications and reports are clear to your customers and staff. Round-the-clock support in Russian and English from our team.
launch.intro2Body: We set up RabbitMatch CRM for your club: courts, schedule, prices and promotions. A personal manager runs onboarding for your team.
launch.step2Body: Move contacts, booking history and subscriptions from Excel or any other system.
launch.step3Body: Online training for administrators and coaches. 24/7 support in Russian and English.

cookieBanner.message: We use cookies to keep you signed in, secure your session, and analyze usage. Choose how we may use them.
legal.terms.title: User Agreement
legal.privacy.title: Personal Data Processing Policy
legal.cookies.title: Cookie Policy
legal.cookies.body:
Operator: Individual Entrepreneur Dmitrii Tunguskov
Email: info@rabbitmatch.pro
Effective date: 01.01.2026
Last updated: 28.05.2026
URL: https://www.rabbitmatch.pro/legal/cookies

1. What Are Cookies

1.1. Cookies are small text files stored on a User's device when they visit the web version of the Application. In mobile apps and the Telegram Mini App, similar functionality is provided by local storage (localStorage), session storage (sessionStorage), and other tracking technologies.

2. Types of Cookies We Use

| Type               | Purpose                               | Retention              | Consent Required |
| ------------------ | ------------------------------------- | ---------------------- | ---------------- |
| Strictly Necessary | Authentication, security, session     | Session / up to 1 year | No               |
| Functional         | Language, UI preferences              | Up to 1 year           | No               |
| Analytical         | Usage analysis, error tracking        | Up to 2 years          | Yes              |
| Marketing          | Personalized advertising, retargeting | Up to 1 year           | Yes              |

2.1. Strictly Necessary Cookies are used for:
• User authentication and session security;
• Remembering booking progress;
• CSRF token protection.

2.2. Analytical Cookies. We use the following analytics tools: Google Analytics, Amplitude, Mixpanel.

2.3. Marketing Cookies are only used with explicit User consent.

3. Third-Party Cookies

3.1. The Application may use cookies from:
• Telegram — for authentication and Mini App functionality. Policy: https://telegram.org/privacy
• Google (Google Auth, Google Analytics, if applicable)
• Infrastructure services (Railway, Expo) — technical cookies

4. Managing Cookies

4.1. Users may at any time:
• change Cookie preferences in the Application's Cookie Settings Center (if available);
• opt out of analytical and marketing cookies via the Cookie banner;
• clear cookies in the browser settings;
• use browser extensions to block cookies.

4.2. Disabling strictly necessary cookies may prevent use of the Application.

4.3. In Telegram Mini App, localStorage management is handled through Telegram client settings.

5. Legal Basis

5.1. Cookies are processed on the following legal grounds:
• Strictly necessary cookies — legitimate interest of the Operator;
• Analytical and marketing cookies — User consent (GDPR Art. 6(1)(a)).
legal.eula.title: End User License Agreement (EULA)
legal.eula.body:
Licensor: Individual Entrepreneur Dmitrii Tunguskov
Email: info@rabbitmatch.pro
Effective date: 01.01.2026
Last updated: 28.05.2026

1. License Grant

1.1. The Licensor grants the User (Licensee) a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the RabbitMatch Application solely for personal, non-commercial purposes on devices owned or controlled by the User.

1.2. The license does NOT include the right to:
• copy, reproduce, or distribute the Application;
• modify, decompile, disassemble, or reverse engineer it;
• create derivative works;
• sublicense or transfer rights to third parties;
• use the Application to build a competing product;
• use commercially without written Licensor consent;
• remove or alter copyright notices.

1.3. The license remains in effect as long as the User complies with the Agreement. Any breach terminates the license automatically.

2. Intellectual Property Rights

2.1. All rights, including copyright, trademarks, patents, trade secrets, and other IP rights in the Application belong to the Licensor.

2.2. "RabbitMatch", the logo, and other brand identifiers are trademarks of the Licensor and may not be used without prior written consent.

2.3. Any suggestions, feedback, or improvement ideas shared by the User become the property of the Licensor without any compensation obligation.

3. Platform Requirements

3.1. Apple App Store. This EULA is between the User and the Licensor, not Apple Inc. Apple is not responsible for the Application. Apple is a third-party beneficiary under this EULA.

3.2. Google Play. This EULA is between the User and the Licensor, not Google LLC. Google is not responsible for the Application.

3.3. Telegram Mini App. Use via Telegram is also governed by Telegram's Terms of Service.

3.4. Export Compliance. User confirms they are not located in a country subject to Georgian or US government embargo and are not on any sanctions lists.

4. Termination

4.1. The Licensor may immediately and unilaterally terminate the license upon any User breach of the EULA or Agreement.

4.2. Upon termination, User must immediately cease using and delete all copies of the Application.
legal.subscription.title: Subscription Terms
legal.subscription.body:
Operator: Individual Entrepreneur Dmitrii Tunguskov
Email: info@rabbitmatch.pro
Effective date: 01.01.2026
Last updated: 28.05.2026

1. Subject Matter

1.1. These Subscription Terms govern the purchase, use, and cancellation of paid subscriptions and other paid services in the RabbitMatch Application.

1.2. Available plans and pricing:

| Tariff | Description                          | Price | Period                 |
| ------ | ------------------------------------ | ----- | ---------------------- |
| PLUS   | [Additional features]                | 5$    | Month                  |
| PLUS   | [Additional features]                | 50$   | When paying for a year |
| PRO    | [Additional features and analytics]  | 15$   | Month                  |
| PRO    | [Additional features and analytics]  | 120$  | When paying for a year |
| MAX    | [Same as in PRO + AI analytics]      | 25$   | Month                  |
| MAX    | [Same as in PRO + AI analytics]      | 190$  | When paying for a year |

1.3. Current pricing is always available in the Application under "Profile" → "Settings" → "Subscription". The Operator may change pricing with at least 30 days' notice before changes take effect.

2. Subscribing

2.1. To subscribe, the User:
• selects a plan in the Application;
• reviews the plan description and price;
• confirms agreement with these Terms (active action — clicking the confirmation button);
• completes payment via: Apple In-App Purchase, Google Play Billing.

2.2. The subscription activates immediately upon successful payment confirmation. The User receives confirmation at the specified email or a notification in Telegram.

2.3. Auto-renewal. If a subscription includes automatic renewal:
• The User is explicitly informed of this before payment;
• Renewal occurs automatically at the end of each billing period;
• A renewal reminder is sent 3–7 days before the renewal date;
• The User may cancel auto-renewal at any time through the subscription management section.

3. Cancellation

3.1. Users may cancel their subscription at any time via:
• "Profile" → "Settings" → "Subscription" → "Cancel subscription" in the Application;
• Email request to info@rabbitmatch.pro;
• App Store (Apple ID settings) for iOS purchases;
• Google Play (Google Play settings) for Android purchases.

3.2. Upon cancellation, access to paid features continues until the end of the current billing period.

3.3. Blocking for violations. In case of breach of the Agreement, Advertising Policy, or other policies, the Operator may immediately cancel the subscription without refund for the unused period and block the Account. A User whose subscription is cancelled due to a violation is not entitled to a refund.

3.4. Changes to subscription terms. If included features change materially, the Operator will notify Users 14 days in advance. In case of material degradation, Users may cancel and receive a pro-rated refund for the unused period.

4. Operator's Rights

4.1. The Operator reserves the right to:
• change pricing with 30 days' notice;
• change plan content with 14 days' notice;
• introduce new plans without notice;
• discontinue paid services with 30 days' notice (pro-rated refunds will be issued);
• immediately cancel a subscription and block an Account for breach of Agreement, without compensation.

4.2. The Operator is not responsible for failures of third-party payment systems, delays in crediting funds, or errors by payment providers.

5. Payment details

5.1. The Operator does not store User payment card data. All payment data is processed through certified payment services in accordance with the PCI DSS standard.
legal.refund.title: Refund Policy
legal.refund.body:
Operator: Individual Entrepreneur Dmitrii Tunguskov
Email: info@rabbitmatch.pro
Effective date: 01.01.2026
Last updated: 28.05.2026

1. General

1.1. This Refund Policy sets out the conditions and procedure for refunds to RabbitMatch Application Users.

1.2. Refunds are processed in accordance with Georgian law and applicable local consumer protection law based on the User's country of residence.

1.3. The maximum refund amount shall not exceed the total amount actually paid by the User to the Operator in the preceding 12 months.

2. Subscription Refunds

2.1. Trial period. If a User subscribes with a free or discounted trial and cancels within the trial period, no charge is made.

2.2. First payment. A full refund for the first payment is available within 14 days of the charge, provided the User has not accessed paid features.

2.3. Subsequent payments. Refunds for completed billing periods are not provided, except:
• technical failure preventing access to paid features for more than 72 hours continuously due to the Operator's fault;
• discontinuation of the Service by the Operator — pro-rated refund for unused period.

2.4. No refund for violations. Refunds are not issued if a subscription was cancelled due to User breach of the Agreement or other policies.

2.5. App Store / Google Play purchases. For subscriptions purchased via Apple App Store or Google Play, refunds are governed by the respective platform's policies. The Operator does not directly manage the refund process for such purchases.

3. Booking Refunds

3.1. The refund conditions for a court reservation are determined by the policy of the court owners and are implemented by default on their side; in other cases:

| Time Before Start       | Refund Condition             |
| ----------------------- | ---------------------------- |
| More than 48 hours      | Full refund (100%)           |
| 24–48 hours             | Partial refund (50%)         |
| Less than 24 hours      | No refund                    |
| Confirmed force majeure | Individual return conditions |

3.2. The initiator of the cancellation must be the User (not another person accepted for the game). The request is made through the Application or sent to info@rabbitmatch.pro with the subject line "Refund" and a full description of the reason for the refund and the details for the refund.

3.3. If the court is cancelled due to the venue owner's fault or for technical reasons on the Operator's side, a full refund is issued.

4. Refund Request Procedure

4.1. To request a refund, Users email info@rabbitmatch.pro with:
• username / account ID;
• payment date and amount;
• reason for the request;
• proof of payment (screenshot, receipt);
• payment details for the refund.

4.2. The Operator reviews requests within 14 business days and notifies the User of the decision.

4.3. Approved refunds are returned to the original payment method within 30 business days of the decision.

4.4. The Operator is not responsible for refund delays caused by transaction processing times of payment systems or banks.

5. Non-Refundable Cases

Refunds are not issued in the following cases:
• Breach of the Agreement or other policies of the Application;
• Unauthorized advertising;
• Match result manipulation or booking fraud;
• Fraudulent use of the Application;
• Disagreement with updated terms where functionality has not changed;
• Change of the User's personal circumstances;
• Account access loss due to the User's own fault (compromise of credentials).
legal.booking.title: Court Booking Rules
legal.booking.body:
Operator: Individual Entrepreneur Dmitrii Tunguskov
Email: info@rabbitmatch.pro
Effective date: 01.01.2026
Last updated: 28.05.2026

1. Subject Matter

1.1. These Rules govern the booking of sports venues through the RabbitMatch Application.

1.2. The Application acts as an intermediary platform between Users and venue owners. The Operator is not the owner or lessor of courts and is not liable for the physical condition, surface quality, availability of equipment, or other characteristics dependent on the venue owner.

2. Booking Process

2.1. The User selects a venue, date, time, and duration.

2.2. The system checks the availability of the selected slot.

2.3. The User confirms the booking and pays via the Application's payment service.

2.4. After successful payment, the User receives a booking confirmation with a unique order number.

2.5. The booking is confirmed only upon successful payment.

3. Rights and Obligations

3.1. The User must:
• arrive at the court at the booked time;
• comply with venue rules;
• not transfer the booking to third parties without approval;
• notify the Operator of cancellation in accordance with the Refund Policy.

3.2. The Operator may:
• cancel bookings for technical reasons with a full refund;
• suspend booking access for Users who repeatedly violate rules or cancel bookings 2 times per month;
• change booking prices with 12 hours' notice.

3.3. The Operator is not liable for:
• force majeure (weather, venue closure, health restrictions);
• court quality and condition;
• venue owner actions after confirmation;
• injuries or health damage on the premises.

4. Special Conditions

4.1. Uncoordinated advertising at the venue. It is prohibited to use the reserved court for commercial events or promotions without prior approval from the Operator.

4.2. Booking on behalf of an organization. If a User books a court for an event with a commercial component (paid tournaments, sponsored events), the User is obliged to notify the Operator and obtain written consent.
